headline: Home Depot (HD) Stock After Mixed 1-Year Returns Is Valuation Now Fairly Priced?
summary: If you have been wondering whether Home Depot stock still offers good value at current levels, this article walks through what the numbers actually say about price versus fundamentals. The stock last closed at US$348.86, with returns of 4.4% over the past 7 days, 9.8% over the past 30 days, a 0.9% gain year to date and a decline of 2.9% over the past year, alongside 21.2% and 22.4% returns over the past 3 and 5 years respectively. Recent coverage of Home Depot has focused on how the stock...

headline: 89-year-old Home Depot hardware rival forced out of business
summary: Independent retailers in the hardware and home improvement sector have faced economic issues since the Covid-19 pandemic that have led many shops to close down permanently. Certain hardware and home improvement stores reported an increase in business initially during the pandemic as ...
